channel.title: GitHub TeX Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of TeX in GitHub

item.title: tuhdo/os01
item.description: Bootstrap yourself to write an OS from scratch. A book for self-learner.

item.title: HarisIqbal88/PlotNeuralNet
item.description: Latex code for making neural networks diagrams

item.title: acl-org/acl-style-files
item.description: Official style files for papers submitted to venues of the Association for Computational Linguistics

item.title: zhanwen/MathModel
item.description: 研究生数学建模，本科生数学建模、数学建模竞赛优秀论文，数学建模算法，LaTeX论文模板，算法思维导图，参考书籍，Matlab软件教程，PPT

item.title: dendibakh/perf-book
item.description: The book "Performance Analysis and Tuning on Modern CPU"

item.title: lervag/vimtex
item.description: VimTeX: A modern Vim and neovim filetype plugin for LaTeX files.

item.title: soulmachine/machine-learning-cheat-sheet
item.description: Classical equations and diagrams in machine learning

item.title: AllenDowney/ThinkPython2
item.description: LaTeX source and supporting code for Think Python, 2nd edition, by Allen Downey.

item.title: sysprog21/lkmpg
item.description: The Linux Kernel Module Programming Guide (updated for 5.0+ kernels)

item.title: Wandmalfarbe/pandoc-latex-template
item.description: A pandoc LaTeX template to convert markdown files to PDF or LaTeX.

item.title: sjtug/SJTUThesis
item.description: 上海交通大学 LaTeX 论文模板 | Shanghai Jiao Tong University LaTeX Thesis Template

item.title: hmemcpy/milewski-ctfp-pdf
item.description: Bartosz Milewski's 'Category Theory for Programmers' unofficial PDF and LaTeX source
